name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-22
title: Assembled prompt invokes nonexistent Skill('superpowers:code-reviewer') at CODE-REVIEW
description: dispatch-tdd-subagent.py line 407 emits 'Invoke: Skill("superpowers:code-reviewer")' in the prompt's Step 7 CODE-REVIEW. No such skill exists in the available-skills list; the actual skill is 'superpowers:requesting-code-review' (or 'code-review:code-review'). When the subagent tries to invoke superpowers:code-reviewer it will get an unknown-skill error and code review will silently be skipped. Fix: update to the correct skill name.

history.note: Fixed as part of Wave 1 bundle in PR (BUG-15/18/22/28/29 all addressed by dispatch-tdd-subagent.py prompt edits).
